/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/yolov8_det.dir/yolov8_det.cpp.o -o yolov8_det   -L/usr/local/cuda/targets/aarch64-linux/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/cuda/targets/aarch64-linux/lib:/home/booster/Workspace/robocup_demo/build/vision/src/model/trt libyolov8_trt.so -lnvinfer -lcudart /usr/lib/libopencv_gapi.so.4.8.0 /usr/lib/libopencv_highgui.so.4.8.0 /usr/lib/libopencv_ml.so.4.8.0 /usr/lib/libopencv_objdetect.so.4.8.0 /usr/lib/libopencv_photo.so.4.8.0 /usr/lib/libopencv_stitching.so.4.8.0 /usr/lib/libopencv_video.so.4.8.0 /usr/lib/libopencv_calib3d.so.4.8.0 /usr/lib/libopencv_dnn.so.4.8.0 /usr/lib/libopencv_features2d.so.4.8.0 /usr/lib/libopencv_flann.so.4.8.0 /usr/lib/libopencv_videoio.so.4.8.0 /usr/lib/libopencv_imgcodecs.so.4.8.0 /usr/lib/libopencv_imgproc.so.4.8.0 /usr/lib/libopencv_core.so.4.8.0
